eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Cooke, TX; at 7:29 AM on JUN 24, 2026 Effective until 9:29 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A gas leak has been detected near the intersection of Main St and Hwy 82 in Muenster TX.  Intersection has been closed until repairs are completed.  Please avoid and follow any detour instructions from onsite personnel.
